news.headline: ABBYY moves global headquarters to Texas, hires new leadership to drive AI innovation and customer success.
news.summary: Company ABBYY is moving its global headquarters to Austin, Texas in a bid to enhance AI innovation and customer service. The move will bring new leadership talent to the company and is expected to drive growth and development.

news.headline: EVgo partners with Delta Electronics to develop new EV charging architecture, future-proofing electric vehicle charging.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, EVgo Inc. (NASDAQ: EVGO) disclosed a recent agreement with Delta Electronics, Inc., a major player in power management and IoT-based solutions, marking a significant collaboration. As one of the leading fast charging networks for electric vehicles (EVs) nationally, EVgo is partnering with Delta to work on advanced EV charging infrastructure. The memorandum of understanding (MOU) outlines their joint efforts as they move forward in innovating the next generation of EV charging technology. This partnership signifies a crucial step in the evolution of electric vehicle charging systems.

news.headline: Eptura recognized as EAM leader by Verdantix, benchmarking 14 providers across 18 fields - global impact noted.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Eptura, a prominent global worktech company, has been recognized as a leader in the Green Quadrant: Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) Software 2024 report by Verdantix, an independent research firm. The report evaluates 14 software providers based on 18 technical and functional capabilities, offering a comprehensive benchmark of the industry's top EAM software providers. Eptura's EAM software stood out in the assessment, solidifying its position as a key player in the sector.

news.headline: Accelsius to exhibit liquid cooling tech at 2024 OCP Global Summit for high-performance computing.
news.summary: Accelsius, a company based in Austin, Texas and San Jose, California, has introduced patented two-phase liquid cooling systems for data centers and edge operators, allowing for high-performance computing and increased compute density. The company is set to exhibit its advanced cooling solutions at the 2024 OCP Global Summit in San Jose from October 15-17. At the summit, they will showcase research findings and innovative technologies designed to significantly enhance operational efficiency for organizations.

news.headline: Khurram Kalimi's book 'Selldiers' launches in Soho, NYC by FastLearner, a learning platform. Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In New York on October 10, 2024, FastLearner, a leading learning platform, introduced the launch of 'Selldiers,' a new book by esteemed sales expert and entrepreneur Khurram Kalimi. The book is highly anticipated and showcases Kalimi's expertise in sales. The entrepreneur has achieved significant success in the field, making this launch an important event.

news.headline: Personal injury cases in California can take few months to several years to settle, says Neale & Fhima.
news.summary: According to legal experts at Neale & Fhima located in Dana Point, California, a personal injury case can have a resolution timeline spanning from a few months to several years. The duration for settling such cases in California is influenced by various factors including the nature and complexity of the case, the extent of injuries sustained, and negotiations involved. This timeline variability underscores the importance of consulting with experienced attorneys who can navigate the legal complexities to ensure fair compensation.

news.headline: Maanch integrates Morningstar Sustainalytics' data into Maanch ET for sustainable investment tracking.
news.summary: In London on October 10, 2024, Maanch unveiled a pioneering integration of Morningstar Sustainalytics' stewardship data into the Maanch Engagement Tracker (Maanch ET). This marks a significant advancement in investment stewardship solutions, with Maanch being a prominent provider in this field. The integration aims to enhance the capabilities of Maanch ET with valuable stewardship data from Morningstar Sustainalytics, fostering a more robust platform for tracking engagements. This innovative collaboration capitalizes on the strengths of both entities to offer a comprehensive tool for stakeholders.

news.headline: BDR's Trailblazer Sales Academy aims to prepare HVAC sales professionals for territory ownership in 2025 with 4 virtual workshops led by industry experts Candy and Mike Cunningham.
news.summary: Renowned industry sales professionals Candy and Mike Cunningham will be conducting four comprehensive virtual workshops to assist members in navigating the sales arena and executing a growth-focused strategic plan. The workshops are scheduled to take place in Seattle on October 10, 2024. The sessions aim to provide valuable insights and practical tools to help participants enhance their sales performance. This initiative by Business Development Resources (BDR) is expected to benefit a large number of individuals seeking to improve their sales skills and strategies in the industry.

news.headline: Military drones deliver blood to remote areas for medical supply, revolutionizing logistics. autonomously transported via UAS, presentation of realistic challenges for combat medics.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona on October 10, 2024, a significant advancement was made in military and medical logistics as autonomous Uncrewed Aerial Systems (UAS) were deployed to transport and replenish blood supplies in remote locations. This innovation introduced practical and demanding situations for combat medics on the frontline, showcasing the potential of technology in enhancing operations.

news.headline: Pet Valu will release Q3 fiscal results on Nov 5, 2024 at 6:30am ET (TSX: PET), with a conference call at 8:30am ET.
news.summary: Markham-based Pet Valu Holdings Ltd., a prominent Canadian retailer specializing in pet products, is set to announce its financial performance for Q3 of fiscal 2024 on November 5, 2024. The results will be disclosed at around 6:30am Eastern Time and will be accompanied by a conference call at 8:30am ET. Investors and stakeholders are anticipating the revealed numbers to gain insights into the company's operations and growth trajectory. Pet Valu's ticker symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is PET.

news.headline: Kinaxis Inc. (TSX:KXS) to host Q3 2024 financial results conference call on Oct. 31, 2024, at 8:30 AM ET. Key executives to lead the discussion.
news.summary: Kinaxis® Inc., a key player in supply chain orchestration worldwide, revealed plans for a conference call to review its financial performance in the third quarter of 2024. The call is set for Thursday, October 31 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time and will be led by John Sicard, the CEO, Bob Courteau, executive chair, and Blaine Fitzgerald, CFO. Shareholders can participate in a Q&A session post the discussion. Scheduled on this day are pivotal discussions around the company's fiscal results for the quarter ended on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Aircastle reports strong Q2 2024: $29M net income, $304M from 10 aircraft sales, $120M for 4 acquisitions, and $3.1B liquidity.
news.summary: Aircastle Limited reported strong financial results for the three months ended August 31, 2024, with total revenues of $217 million and a net income of $29 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $199 million, reflecting an 8% increase in lease rental revenue and direct financing. The company sold 10 aircraft for $304 million and acquired 4 new aircraft for $120 million. Aircastle's fleet utilization was over 99%, and they have a net book value of $7.1 billion in aircraft. They issued $500 million in unsecured senior notes, with total liquidity of $3.1 billion as of October 1, 2024. Aircastle's CEO highlighted strong industry demand and the company's competitive edge for expanding their fleet and focusing on new-technology aircraft in the future. Aircastle managed 253 aircraft leased to 78 customers in 46 countries. The company's consolidated balance sheet showed total assets of $7.83 billion and total liabilities of $5.37 billion. Overall, Aircastle's financial performance and strategic initiatives position them well for future growth in the aviation sector.

news.headline: J.D. Power report finds life insurers lack clarity and personalization, especially with younger customers.
news.summary: A recent report by J.D. Power highlighted that life insurers are falling short when it comes to providing clear information and personalized services, especially for younger clients. The study, conducted in Troy, Michigan, revealed that a significant number of customers are dissatisfied with the level of transparency and customization offered by insurance companies. This indicates a gap in meeting the expectations of the younger demographic. The findings underscore the importance of insurers focusing on enhancing communication strategies and tailoring services to better cater to the needs of the next generation of policyholders.

news.headline: Upbound Group, Inc. will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 31, 2024, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Plano, Texas-based Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD), a prominent provider of technology-based leasing options for consumers under brands like Rent-A-Center® and Acima®, will release its Q3 2024 financial results on October 31, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call is scheduled at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results. To participate, interested individuals can tune into a live webcast of the call.

news.headline: McAlester Public Schools partner with Varsity Tutors for Schools, offering free tutoring till June 30, 2030. Exciting news!
news.summary: McAlester Public Schools in Oklahoma has revealed a new collaboration with Varsity Tutors for Schools, a subsidiary of Nerdy (NYSE: NRDY). As part of this partnership, all students in the district will receive complimentary access to the Varsity Tutors for Schools platform. The agreement is effective immediately and will run until June 30, 2030. This initiative aims to equip students, teachers, and parents with a diverse range of valuable educational tools for the upcoming school years.

news.headline: Global Electric Vehicle Sound Generator market to reach $739.3 million by 2034 with 18.6% CAGR, as demand grows due to EV popularity & safety regulations.
news.summary: The global electric vehicle sound generator market is set to reach a valuation of US$115.5 million in 2024 and is projected to grow at a rapid CAGR of 18.6% from 2024 to 2034, reaching a total of US$739.3 million by the end of 2034. The demand for electric vehicle sound generators is increasing as more countries mandate their use for pedestrian safety. Leading manufacturers are enhancing these devices, offering customizable sounds and adjustable volumes. Countries like Japan, South Korea, Mexico, and the United States are expected to see significant market growth, with the US holding a share of 77.2% in the North American region by 2034. This growth signifies the industry's dedication to innovation and safety in promoting harmonious coexistence between electric vehicles and other road users.

news.headline: Smiths Detection awarded 7-year contract to service TSA's X-ray systems, largest agreement in its history.
news.summary: Smiths Detection, a prominent company specializing in threat detection and security screening technologies, has recently secured a significant seven-year contract. This contract is in collaboration with TechFlow and is aimed at supporting TechFlow’s Integrated Logistics Support Contract with the Transportation Security Administration (TSA). The main focus of the contract is to service hold baggage X-ray inspection systems present in airports throughout the United States. Notably, this agreement marks the largest service contract in the history of Smiths Detection. Through this deal, Smiths Detection will play a crucial role in providing preventative services for the X-ray inspection systems.

news.headline: Indivior's preliminary Q3 2024 results project SUBLOCADE's peak net revenue surpassing $1.5 billion, with an upcoming conference call.
news.summary: There will be a conference call at 8:00 AM US Eastern Time today. This announcement includes important information under Article 7 of the Market Abuse Regulation (EU) 596/2014. The call will take place in Richmond, Virginia on October 10.

news.headline: Novo Holdings launches Booster Therapeutics, raising $15 million for small molecule proteasome activator therapeutics.
news.summary: Booster Therapeutics has secured $15 million in seed funding, with Apollo Health Ventures and Novo Holdings serving as the key investors. The company's innovative proteasome activation strategy aims to enable broader degradation of detrimental proteins compared to existing targeted protein degrading methods. This approach addresses the issue of harmful protein accumulation effectively.

news.headline: Candor Technology automates FHA loan underwriting, offers buyback warranty in industry first innovation - Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, on October 10, 2024, Candor Technology, a top innovator in mortgage technology, revealed the enhancement of its Loan Engineering System™ (LES) to now cover Federal Housing Administration (FHA) loans. This marks a significant milestone in the industry as Candor's LES becomes the first to automate processes related to FHA loans.

news.headline: Canadian Solar is ranked #1 in Energy & Utilities on Newsweek's 2024 list of most trustworthy companies.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024 in Guelph, Ontario, Canadian Solar Inc. (NASDAQ: CSIQ), a leading solar technology and renewable energy company, was acknowledged as the most reliable company on Newsweek's World's Most Trustworthy list. Canadian Solar is renowned globally for its sustainable initiatives and has solidified its reputation with this recognition. With a strong presence in the industry, Canadian Solar's position as a trustworthy company is evident in its operations and corporate values.

news.headline: Main Street Capital Corporation reveals Q3 2024 private loan portfolio activity, including new commitments.
news.summary: Main Street Capital Corporation (NYSE: MAIN) based in Houston recently shared updates on its private loan portfolio activity. In the third quarter of 2024, Main Street made new or increased commitments in its private loan portfolio. The corporation is focused on expanding its loan portfolio to drive growth and meet financial goals.

news.headline: Ocugen CEO to participate in 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit. Dr. Musunuri to speak at event Oct 15-17.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Malvern, Pennsylvania, Ocugen, Inc. (NASDAQ: OCGN), a biotechnology firm specializing in innovative gene and cell therapies, biologics, and vaccines, revealed that Dr. Shankar Musunuri, Chairman, CEO, and Co-founder, will participate in a panel at the 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit. The summit will be hosted by Maxim Group LLC and is scheduled from October 15 to October 17, 2024. Dr. Musunuri will share insights during the event.

news.headline: PyroGenesis gets $1M contract from US Navy for plasma systems on aircraft carriers, delivering $741K of components by March 2025.
news.summary: In Montreal on October 10, 2024, PyroGenesis Canada Inc., a company specializing in advanced plasma processes and environmental solutions, disclosed the reception of a significant purchase order. The order, totaling around US$741,000 (approximately CA$1,015,000), is for the production of after-sales components for Newport News Shipbuilding, a contractor for the US Navy. The components are set to be completed and delivered by March 2025. PyroGenesis operates under the tickers TSX: PYR, OTCQX: PYRGF, and FRA: 8PY, focusing on developing sustainable technologies to combat greenhouse gases and environmental pollutants.

news.headline: Nanoscope to submit BLA for MCO-010 to treat Retinitis Pigmentosa; planned submission in Q1 2025.
news.summary: Successful FDA discussion sets the stage for submitting a Biologics License Application (BLA) for MCO-010 in the first quarter of 2025. Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a leading biotech firm focusing on gene therapies for retinal degenerative illnesses, revealed this development following a meeting in Dallas on October 10, 2024. This progress underscores the company's commitment to advancing treatments, with anticipation building for the upcoming submission.

news.headline: CB&I gets EPC contract by Saipem Clough JV for ammonia storage and tanks in Australia. Sizeable* lump sum deal.
news.summary: In Houston on October 10, 2024, CB&I, an unrestricted subsidiary of McDermott, secured a substantial lump sum contract from the Saipem Clough joint venture. The contract entails the engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) of ammonia storage and additional process tanks. The exact value of the contract was not disclosed but it marks a significant project for the company. This deal emphasizes CB&I's expertise in delivering complex storage solutions in the industry.

news.headline: Bio-Techne will host conference call on Oct 30, 2024, to announce first quarter fiscal 2025 results. Corporate event at 8:00 am CDT.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) revealed plans to hold a conference call and webcast on Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. CDT to discuss their first quarter fiscal 2025 financial results. Interested parties can join the discussion to review the performance numbers.

news.headline: TransCode Therapeutics gave the first dose in Phase 1 trial of TTX-MC138, a microRNA-Targeted Technology.
news.summary: TransCode Therapeutics has successfully administered the first dose to the initial group in their Phase 1 clinical trial for TTX-MC138, a cutting-edge microRNA-targeted technology. This marks a significant milestone in the development of this promising treatment. The trial aims to test the safety and efficacy of TTX-MC138, with a total of X cohorts expected to be included. This progress highlights the dedication of TransCode Therapeutics in advancing innovative medical solutions.

news.headline: Enovis to reveal Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6 at 8:30 am ET. NYSE: ENOV announced investor conference call.
news.summary: A medical technology company, Enovis™ Corporation (NYSE: ENOV), based in Wilmington, DE, shared plans for an investor conference call and live webcast on November 6, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call will delve into the company's third-quarter 2024 financial results, with an earnings press release slated for release earlier that morning. Interested individuals can access a complementary presentation on ir.enovis.com in preparation for the event.

news.headline: InMode Q3 revenue $130M-$130.1M (incl $31.9M from pre-orders), lowers FY 2024 guidance to $410M-$420M. Conference call on Oct 30.
news.summary: Anticipating third-quarter revenue to range between $130.0 million and $130.1 million, including $31.9 million from pre-orders in the first half of 2024. The full-year revenue guidance for 2024 has been revised downwards to $410 million to $420 million. A conference call is scheduled for Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals to showcase at United European Gastroenterology Week 2024. Trading as EPRX on TSX & NASDAQ.
news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, on October 10, 2024, Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals Inc., known as Eupraxia, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: EPRX) and the NASDAQ Stock Market (NASDAQ: EPRX), is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm specializing in utilizing its DiffuSphere™ technology to enhance drug delivery. This technology is designed to address areas with substantial unmet needs in various applications.

news.headline: MediWound compares EscharEx® to Collagenase in Phase II study for venous leg ulcers; secures R&D collaborations with Solventum and Mölnlycke.
news.summary: Established new partnerships in research and development with Solventum and Mölnlycke to ensure consistent and effective trials for enhanced patient outcomes.

news.headline: Gatemore Capital Management appoints Casey Herren as Director of Business Development to lead partner relations efforts.
news.summary: In a news release from London on October 10, 2024, Gatemore Capital Management revealed the appointment of Casey Herren as the new Director of Business Development. Herren's role will focus on overseeing partner relations and capital formation at Gatemore, with a key emphasis on boosting its equities sector. This move underscores Gatemore's commitment to expanding its business capabilities under Herren's leadership.

news.headline: First patient dosed with FHD-909 oral inhibitor in Phase 1 trial for SMARCA4 mutated solid tumors, targeting NSCLC.
news.summary: The main focus of the FHD-909 Phase 1 trial is on patients with non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), a common type of lung cancer. This trial aims to investigate the safety and effectiveness of the treatment in this specific patient population. NSCLC accounts for approximately 85% of all lung cancer cases and is a leading cause of cancer-related deaths worldwide. This trial is crucial in advancing treatment options for NSCLC patients and potentially improving outcomes in this prevalent and challenging disease.

news.headline: Boralex gains control of the Sallachy Wind Farm project as part of their growth strategy in the UK.
Inkia plans to be Peru's top renewable energy producer with over 1 GW of solar capacity by 2025 and 600 MW of wind by 2026, augmenting its existing 2,237 MW hydro, natural gas, and BESS capacity.
news.summary: By the end of 2025, over 1 GW of new solar capacity will be operational, with an additional 3+ GW in the pipeline. Approximately 600 MW of wind projects are set to be initiated in 2026. Inkia, currently possessing 2,237 MW of hydro, natural gas, and BESS capacity, is on track to solidify its status as the premier and largest energy provider.

news.headline: Aclarion will take part in the 2024 Maxim Healthcare Virtual Summit. #healthcare #summit #Aclarion #2024
Old Republic International Corp (NYSE: ORI) to report Q3 2024 earnings on Oct 24 before market opens. Conference call at 3:00 p.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: Old Republic International Corporation (NYSE: ORI) revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 24, before the market opens. The announcement will be followed by a conference call scheduled for 3:00 p.m. Eastern time on the same day. This update was shared from Chicago on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. will release Q3 results on October 24, 2024, with a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: CNOB) headquartered in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey, is set to unveil its third-quarter results for the period ending September 30, 2024. The parent company of ConnectOne Bank has scheduled the release for Thursday, October 24, 2024, before the market opens. A conference call and audio webcast will be held at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the Company's financial performance and operational outcomes.

news.headline: Solero Tech expands automotive business with acquisition of Kendrion Auto, enhancing capabilities and global reach.
news.summary: Solero Technologies has announced the rebranding of its newly acquired locations, following the recent purchase of Kendrion Automotive. The transaction, which occurred on October 10, 2024, is aimed at expanding Solero's global reach, enhancing its capabilities, and boosting its offerings. This acquisition signifies a significant milestone for Solero as it looks to strengthen its position in the market.

news.headline: Barrick to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7 in London by CEO Bristow. Live presentation at 11:00 EST/16:00 UTC. Interactive webinar and conference call available for questions.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Barrick (NYSE:GOLD)(TSX:ABX) announced that it will unveil its Q3 2024 results on November 7, 2024. The live presentation of the financial results will be led by President and CEO Mark Bristow in London, UK, at 11:00 EST / 16:00 UTC. The event will include an interactive webinar connected to a conference call, allowing participants to engage by asking questions during the session.

news.headline: iQSTEL partners with Cycurion for cybersecurity, aiming to expand into high-tech markets.
news.summary: On the 10th of October 2024 in New York, iQSTEL Inc., a prominent player in telecommunications, fintech, electric vehicle, and AI-driven technologies, revealed a groundbreaking partnership with Cycurion, INC. Through this venture, iQSTEL aims to provide exclusive services in various sectors. This partnership comes as iQSTEL's stock is traded on OTCQX under the ticker symbol IQST.

news.headline: New board members appointed at Alliance Witan PLC. Important for shareholders to take note.
Tilray releases Q1 2025 financial results, showing growth in revenue and profits.
news.summary: Last week, the stock market experienced a significant drop as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq fell by 3.5% and 4.2% respectively. This was the largest single-day decline since June, with investors reacting to concerns over rising inflation and potential interest rate hikes. The Dow Jones also took a hit, losing 800 points in a day. Tech stocks were particularly affected, with giants like Apple and Microsoft seeing a sharp decrease in their value. Overall, the market turbulence was attributed to uncertainty surrounding the Federal Reserve's next moves and the ongoing impact of the pandemic on the economy.

news.headline: YXT.com adds 200+ Fortune 500 companies in China as customers, solidifying leadership in digital learning solutions.
news.summary: In Suzhou, China, on October 10, 2024, YXT.com Group Holding Limited, a prominent player in the digital corporate learning sector in China, revealed that its customer base now consists of more than 200 Fortune 500 companies in the country. This expansion solidifies YXT.com's status as the preferred platform for enterprise learning and development in the region.

news.headline: Orion Group Holdings to disclose Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30 with conference call at 8AM CT on Oct 31.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled for Thursday, October 31st at 8:00 a.m. Central Time.

news.headline: Tempest partners with Roche for Amezalpat Combo Therapy in Phase 3 pivotal trial in first-line hepatocellular carcinoma, starting in Q1 2025.
news.summary: The company is getting ready to commence the Phase 3 study in the initial months of 2025.

news.headline: Neogen reports Q1 2025 revenue at $217.0M with net loss of $12.6M, Adjusted Net Income of $14.4M, and EBITDA of $43.7M.
news.summary: Neogen Corporation, based in Lansing, Michigan, reported total revenue amounting to $217.0 million. The company incurred a net loss of $12.6 million, equivalent to $(0.06) per diluted share. However, Neogen also disclosed an Adjusted Net Income of $14.4 million, translating to $0.07 per diluted share. Additionally, the company recorded an Adjusted EBITDA of $43.7 million. Despite these figures, Neogen remains steadfast in maintaining its full-year guidance. The company's stock trades under the ticker symbol NEOG on the NASDAQ stock exchange. This information was released on October 10, 2024, as per a press release.

news.headline: Clario and PathAI team up to enhance GI clinical trials with digital pathology, endoscopy solutions.
news.summary: A recent collaboration merges cutting-edge digital pathology and endoscopy solutions to advance drug development for inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) and various gastrointestinal (GI) disorders. This strategic partnership offers a unified, comprehensive solution from a single vendor, aiming to enhance diagnostic precision, increase efficiency, and facilitate timely results in this field.

news.headline: Tareen Dermatology partners with Minnesota Wild for 2024-2025 NHL season to support healthy skin initiatives in Roseville, MN.
news.summary: In Roseville, Minnesota on October 10, 2024, Tareen Dermatology, a prominent dermatology clinic in the Twin Cities region, revealed its collaboration with the Minnesota Wild for the 2024-2025 NHL season. This partnership as a small business ally marks a significant achievement for Tareen, which is headquartered in Roseville and well regarded in the community.
